name: KPop Concert Dress Up
author: Poki
description: KPop Concert Dress Up is a dress-up game where you style three rising idols for the ultimate stage performance. Mix and match hairstyles, bold makeup, and dazzling outfits to make each star shine. Then design the concert scene with lights, decorations, and colorful smoke effects. Pick the song, start the show, and watch your group perform. Can you create the perfect K-Pop concert? How do I play KPop Concert Dress Up? Use your mouse to select select the clothing an decoration pieces. Who created KPop Concert Dress Up? KPop Concert Dress Up is created by 9Lives Games. Play their other games on Poki: Blobby Clicker and Racing Rampage ! How can I play KPop Concert Dress Up for free? You can play KPop Concert Dress Up for free on Poki. Can I play KPop Concert Dress Up on mobile devices and desktop? KPop Concert Dress Up can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
